ps.ptxt: Shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Timing solenoid valve circuit faulty only when N → D or 3 ↔ 4 shifting

action.ptxt: Inspect timing solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair timing solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.

ps.ptxt: Input shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair input shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair ATF temperature sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Inspect CKP sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair CKP sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.

ps.ptxt: Shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Inspect timing solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair timing solenoid valve circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect transmission range sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair transmission range sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect transmission range sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair transmission range sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Inspect timing solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair timing solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.

ps.ptxt: Input shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair input shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect transmission range sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair transmission range sensor circuit.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair ATF temperature sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Inspect ECT sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair ECT sensor circuit.
Inspect CKP sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair CKP sensor circuit.
Refer to No Gear Shift to 4th Gear .
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Inspect timing solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair timing solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.

ps.ptxt: Input shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair input shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Refer to No Gear Shift to 4th Gear .
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.

ps.ptxt: TCC pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect TCC pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair TCC pressure control solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.

ps.ptxt: Input shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair input shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect transmission range sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair transmission range sensor circuit.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair ATF temperature sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Inspect ECT sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair ECT sensor circuit.
Refer to No Lock-Up Occurs .
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair ATF temperature sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.

ps.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair pressure control solenoid valve circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.

condition.ptxt: Unable to run in any range

action.ptxt: Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect engine. If NG, repair engine.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”

action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of input shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace input shaft speed sensor.
Inspect transmission range sensor. If NG, replace transmission range sensor.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor. If NG, replace ATF temperature sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of timing solenoid valve only when N → D or 3 ↔ 4 shifting

action.ptxt: Inspect timing solenoid valve. If NG, replace timing solenoid valve.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of brake light switch except N → D or N → R shifting

action.ptxt: Inspect brake light switch.
If NG, replace brake light switch.
Inspect CKP sensor.
If NG, replace CKP sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “B”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.
Inspect transmission range sensor. If NG, replace transmission range sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “A”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “A”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.
Inspect transmission range sensor. If NG, replace transmission range sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “B”.
Inspect timing solenoid valve. If NG, replace timing solenoid valve.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of input shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace input shaft speed sensor.
Inspect transmission range sensor. If NG, replace transmission range sensor.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor. If NG, replace ATF temperature sensor.
Inspect O/D off switch. If NG, replace select lever assembly.
Inspect ECT sensor.
If NG, replace ECT sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “B”.
Inspect timing solenoid valve. If NG, replace timing solenoid valve.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of input shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace input shaft speed sensor.
Inspect O/D off switch. If NG, replace select lever assembly.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “A”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “A”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect shift solenoid valve “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “B”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect engine. If NG, repair engine.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of TCC pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect TCC pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”

action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”. If NG, replace shift solenoid valve “A” and/or “B”.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of output shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace output shaft speed sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of input shaft speed sensor

action.ptxt: Inspect input shaft speed sensor. If NG, replace input shaft speed sensor.
Inspect transmission range sensor. If NG, replace transmission range sensor.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor. If NG, replace ATF temperature sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.
Inspect throttle position sensor.
If NG, replace throttle body.
Inspect ECT sensor.
If NG, replace ECT sensor.
Inspect brake light switch.
If NG, replace brake light switch.
Replace valve body assembly.
Inspect ATF temperature sensor. If NG, replace ATF temperature sensor.

ps.ptxt: Malfunction of pressure control solenoid valve

action.ptxt: Inspect pressure control solenoid valve. If NG, replace valve body assembly.
Replace oil strainer.
Replace valve body assembly.

condition.ptxt: Unable to run in any range

action.ptxt: Inspect oil pump. If NG, replace oil pump.
Inspect planetary gear. If NG, replace planetary gear.
Inspect one-way clutch No.2. If NG, replace one-way clutch No.2.
Inspect drive plate. If NG, replace drive plate.
Inspect forward clutch. If NG, replace forward clutch.
Inspect reverse clutch. If NG, replace reverse clutch.
Inspect 1st and reverse brake. If NG, replace 1st and reverse brake.
Replace torque converter.
Inspect forward clutch. If NG, replace forward clutch.
Inspect reverse clutch. If NG, replace reverse clutch.
Inspect 1st and reverse brake. If NG, replace 1st and reverse brake.

condition.ptxt: Poor 1 → 2 shift, excessive shock or slippage

action.ptxt: Inspect 2nd brake. If NG, replace 2nd brake.
Inspect one-way clutch No.1. If NG, replace one-way clutch No.1.

condition.ptxt: Poor 2 → 3 shift, excessive shock or slippage

action.ptxt: Inspect direct clutch. If NG, replace direct clutch.

condition.ptxt: Poor 3 ↔ O/D shift, excessive shock or slippage

action.ptxt: Inspect forward clutch. If NG, replace forward clutch.
Inspect O/D and 2nd coast brake. If NG, replace O/D and 2nd coast brake.

condition.ptxt: Poor 3 → 2 shift, excessive shock or slippage

action.ptxt: Inspect direct clutch. If NG, replace direct clutch.
Inspect one-way clutch No.1. If NG, replace one-way clutch No.1.

condition.ptxt: Poor 2 → 1 shift, excessive shock or slippage

action.ptxt: Inspect 2nd brake. If NG, replace 2nd brake.
Inspect one-way clutch No.2. If NG, replace one-way clutch No.2.
Replace torque converter.
Inspect oil pump. If NG, replace oil pump.
Inspect forward clutch. If NG, replace forward clutch.
Inspect one-way clutch No.2. If NG, replace one-way clutch No.2.

ps.ptxt: Leakage from “D” range fluid pressure circuit

action.ptxt: Overhaul or replace valve body assembly.
Inspect oil pump. If NG, replace oil pump.
Inspect reverse clutch. If NG, replace reverse clutch.
Inspect 1st and reverse brake. If NG, replace 1st and reverse brake.

ps.ptxt: Leakage from “R” range fluid pressure circuit

action.ptxt: Overhaul or replace valve body assembly.

condition.ptxt: Poor engine brake in downshift to “2” range

action.ptxt: Inspect O/D and 2nd coast brake. If NG, replace O/D and 2nd coast brake.

condition.ptxt: Poor engine brake in downshift to “L” range

action.ptxt: Inspect 1st and reverse brake. If NG, replace 1st and reverse brake.
